creator: jakub_lach@mailplus.pl
text:
(In reply to Emmanuel Vadot from comment #8)

Understandable, just wanted to have a data point in place, as I've found it super weird (for years I was convinced it's fully hardware here). 

Backlight +/- is not very useful in this case as the gradation is rather non existent, however just found out it works very precisely with numerical values - thanks manu!
